entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop used for genetic and combining ability analysis

entities.name: COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The ability of a parent to pass on desirable traits to its offspring

entities.name: HETEROSIS
entities.description: The tendency of a crossbred individual to show qualities superior to those of both parents

entities.name: VARIANCE COMPONENTS
entities.description: The proportion of total phenotypic variance attributable to genetic and environmental factors

entities.name: RESTORERS
entities.description: Lines used to restore fertility in male sterile lines

entities.name: MALE STERILE
entities.description: Lines that cannot produce functional pollen

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: The number of days until half of the plants in a population have flowered

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical distance from the ground to the highest point of the plant

entities.name: PANICLE LENGTH
entities.description: The length of the flowering head of the sorghum plant

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD FOR PANICLE
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per panicle

entities.name: NUMBER OF GRAINS PER PANICLE
entities.description: The count of individual grains on a single panicle

entities.name: THOUSAND GRAIN WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of one thousand grains

entities.name: GRAIN BREAKING STRENGTH
entities.description: The force required to break a grain

entities.name: % FLOATERS
entities.description: The percentage of grains that float in water

entities.name: % WATER ABSORPTION
entities.description: The percentage of water absorbed by the grain

entities.name: FLOUR PARTICLE SIZE INDEX
entities.description: A measure of the size of particles in the flour produced from the grain

entities.name: ROLLING QUALITY OF THE DOUGH
entities.description: The quality of the dough when rolled

entities.name: GEL SPREADING
entities.description: The ability of the gel to spread
